privileged_info_summary: The BIO101 course is created in the Moodle test environment via setup_moodle.sh with fullname='Introduction to Biology'. The referenced YouTube video 8IlzKri08kk is a real, publicly available educational video by The Amoeba Sisters titled 'Prokaryotic and Eukaryotic Cells', covering introduction to cell biology. The task requires creation of a Moodle Page resource (not URL resource) in BIO101 with the name 'Supplementary Video: Cell Theory' and embedded video content plus instructional text. The verifier checks for correct resource type (automatic failure if URL instead of Page), page existence, name matching, video ID presence in content, and instructional text phrases.
